Department of Financial Affairs

Department of Financial Affairs

Istanbul Galata University Department of Financial Affairs is responsible for ensuring the most appropriate and efficient use of available financial resources to fulfill the services and activities in its field of duty together with the economic aspect, carrying out student accounting and informing students about their financial obligations, ensuring that the workflow is planned and completed in full within the legal legislation.

Our Team
